hero.title: AuditM-Field
hero.description: Configurable offline-first PWA for field photo audits, visual image annotation, dynamic checklists, and structured ZIP/JSON export.

configs.title: Configs
configs.description: Load audit configs from GitHub, local JSON files, or direct URLs.

inspections.title: Inspections
inspections.description: Create local field inspections and attach photos from gallery.

annotation.title: Annotation
annotation.description: Mark zones on images and fill dynamic checklists.

export.title: Export
export.description: Export ZIP packages with photos, annotations, config, and manifest.

merchandiser.title: Merchandiser workspace
merchandiser.description: Create inspections, upload photos, submit them for review, view supervisor markup without editing it, and upload photos after corrections.

supervisor.title: Supervisor workspace
supervisor.description: Review submitted visits, add markup, capture violations, request corrections, and approve the result.

admin.title: Admin workspace
admin.description: Manage configs, test role scenarios, and prepare demo audit workflows.

viewer.title: Viewer mode
viewer.description: View available inspections and evidence packages without changing decisions.

annotator.title: Open annotator
annotator.description: View or review photo markup depending on role.

configs.title: Manage configs
configs.description: Load and manage audit JSON configs.
